recommendations.title: Ride Like a Girl
recommendations.overview: The story of Michelle Payne, the first female jockey to win the Melbourne Cup.

recommendations.title: The Thing from Another World
recommendations.overview: Scientists and US Air Force officials fend off a blood-thirsty alien organism while investigating at a remote arctic outpost.

recommendations.title: Jack Frost
recommendations.overview: On his way to be executed, the vehicle containing notorious serial killer Jack Frost collides with a hazardous chemical truck, turning him into a snow covered mutant and unleashing him on the unsuspecting town of Snomonton.

recommendations.title: Cruel Jaws
recommendations.overview: A tiger shark bred by the Navy as a killing machine is wreaking havoc in the sleepy tourist town of Hampton Bay.

recommendations.title: The Vault
recommendations.overview: Two estranged sisters are forced to rob a bank in order to save their brother. But this is no ordinary bank.
